subcodes.first_line: Thou seest me, O my God, in captivity between two factions, and hearest my cry and the lamentation of my heart for that which hath befallen me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی فی السجن بین الحزبین و تسمع ضجیجی و حنین قلبی بما ورد علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
